rules_text:
Whenever you gain hunger, put an endurance counter on Starving Masses.
Exert, Destroy Starving Masses: Attack X, where X is the number of endurance counters on it. [i](Choose an opponent. They choose themselves or a card they control that has obstruct. If they chose themselves, they lose X health. If they chose a card they control, remove X endurance counter from it.)[/i]
